# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd no mtls and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-service
        image: my-service-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: my-service

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  port: 8080
  protocol: http

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: my-service-server
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespace: my-namespace
        name: my-service
    to:
    - operation:
        method: GET
        path: /secure-endpoint
  - from:
    - source:
        namespace: my-namespace
        name: another-service
    to:
    - operation:
        method: POST
        path: /secure-endpoint

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: my-service-server
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespace: my-namespace
  - to:
    - operation:
        method: GET
        path: /public-endpoint

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  port: 8080
  protocol: http
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
